testcase.name: test_update_brand_with_feature_cards

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 2 feature cards, got 0 assert 0 == 2 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_cms_extended.py:122: in test_update_brand_with_feature_cards assert len(saved_cards) == 2, f"Expected 2 feature cards, got {len(saved_cards)}" E AssertionError: Expected 2 feature cards, got 0 E assert 0 == 2 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_update_brand_with_gallery_images

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 3 gallery images, got 0 assert 0 == 3 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_cms_extended.py:156: in test_update_brand_with_gallery_images assert len(saved_gallery) == 3, f"Expected 3 gallery images, got {len(saved_gallery)}" E AssertionError: Expected 3 gallery images, got 0 E assert 0 == 3 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_update_brand_with_related_solutions

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 3 related solutions, got 0 assert 0 == 3 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_cms_extended.py:185: in test_update_brand_with_related_solutions assert len(saved_solutions) == 3, f"Expected 3 related solutions, got {len(saved_solutions)}" E AssertionError: Expected 3 related solutions, got 0 E assert 0 == 3 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_create_project_with_extended_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: category not saved: None assert None == 'Smart Villa' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf96f8553d240>('category') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf96f8553d240> = {'budget_range': None, 'challenge': 'The client wanted a fully integrated smart home that could be controlled from anywhere in the world.', 'client_name': None, 'client_role': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_cms_extended.py:254: in test_create_project_with_extended_fields assert created_project.get("category") == "Smart Villa", f"category not saved: {created_project.get('category')}" E AssertionError: category not saved: None E assert None == 'Smart Villa' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf96f8553d240>('category') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf96f8553d240> = {'budget_range': None, 'challenge': 'The client wanted a fully integrated smart home that could be controlled from anywhere in the world.', 'client_name': None, 'client_role': None, ...}.get
